examples.text: Today on People in the News, our guest is John Williams. The name may not sound familiar to you, but John was once an acclaimed basketball player. John, you stunned fans by leaving the sport at just 25. Why did you retire so early?
examples.explanation: 今天在《新闻人物》节目中，我们的嘉宾是约翰·威廉姆斯。这个名字您可能不太熟悉，但约翰曾是一位备受赞誉的篮球运动员。约翰，您在年仅25岁时就退出这项运动，这让粉丝们感到震惊。您为何如此早地选择退役？

reviewSessions.example_text: Today on People in the News, our guest is John Williams. The name may not sound familiar to you, but John was once an acclaimed basketball player. John, you stunned fans by leaving the sport at just 25. Why did you retire so early?
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案抓住了核心义“使……震惊”，但未体现短语搭配 by 的用法。
matched_points: 与参考释义“使……震惊”基本一致
missing_points: 未体现短语整体用法 stun by 在句中的搭配关系
表达不够完整，可写为“使……因某事而震惊/让……感到震惊”
